
SELECT
    enrollment_id,
    COUNT(*) AS repeats
FROM dbo.Enrollments_TEST
WHERE coverage_year=2025
AND hios_issuer_id=13535
AND MONTH(GAA_Load_Datetime)=6
GROUP BY enrollment_id
HAVING COUNT(*)>1
ORDER BY repeats DESC;
